shots.caption: Same feedback pattern across mark types

shots.title: Inspector · line
shots.caption: ThreeMeshUI.Block panel with troika text, placed adjacent to hovered mark

shots.title: Inspector · bar
shots.caption: Same panel template, different content per mark

shots.title: Inspector · scatter
shots.caption: Inspector reads UC3 poster dataspace manifest values

shots.title: Inspector · arc + breadcrumb
shots.caption: TBOC breadcrumb arc with chapter trail readout

shots.title: M3 overview · inspector floating near line
shots.caption: Shows spatial relationship: chart left, inspector right. Spatial audio: PositionalAudio at each mark (not audible in screenshot).

shots.title: Inspector placement · bar (auto flip left)
shots.caption: placeNear auto-selects side with clearance — bar is on the right half, card flips to the left

shots.title: Inspector placement · line (auto right)
shots.caption: line is on the left half, card auto-places to the right

shots.title: Brush · line (middle 40%)
shots.caption: Translucent cyan selection rectangle + count readout in inspector

shots.title: Brush · bar (last 30%)
shots.caption: Same brush primitive works across mark types

shots.title: Brush · scatter (left half)
shots.caption: Point-in-range filter over InstancedMesh

shots.title: Brush overview · two marks selected
shots.caption: Inspector shows last-brushed count; chart retains selection

shots.title: Trigger = activate · bar selected
shots.caption: Trigger toggles a latched "selected" state. Outline + inspector pin even when you look away. Trigger again to release.

shots.title: Drag brush · start
shots.caption: Real pointer down on line chart; brush rectangle appears

shots.title: Drag brush · mid-drag
shots.caption: Rubberband widens as pointer moves right

shots.title: Drag brush · released
shots.caption: Selection persists; inspector shows sample count

shots.title: Ambient bed · ON
shots.caption: Omnitone FOA renderer initialized with a procedural 4-channel buffer. Rotation matrix updated per frame.

shots.title: Ambient bed · off
shots.caption: Baseline state — bed not started; user must opt in

shots.title: Dataspace focus · UC1 (wrist)
shots.caption: line mark stays bright; room + poster marks dim (0.25 opacity, 0.85 scale)

shots.title: Dataspace focus · UC2 (room)
shots.caption: bar mark active; wrist and poster dim

shots.title: Dataspace focus · UC3 (poster)
shots.caption: scatter + arc both belong to UC3 and stay bright together

shots.title: Dataspace focus · all (null)
shots.caption: Clearing focus returns every mark to full brightness

shots.title: Viz gallery · overview
shots.caption: 6 new marks from §9: tree (radial), treemap (extruded), sunburst (stacked), circular packing (spheres), force (3D physics), ridgeline (depth-offset)

shots.title: Viz gallery · 3/4 angle
shots.caption: Perspective confirms every mark has real z-depth

shots.title: Tree · radial (§9.1)
shots.caption: d3-cluster layout remapped to polar; InstancedMesh spheres + LineSegments edges

shots.title: Treemap · extruded (§9.2)
shots.caption: d3-treemap layout; extrusion height = value (second quantity)

shots.title: Sunburst · stacked discs (§9.5)
shots.caption: d3-partition with polar remap; one disc per hierarchy level, +z per level

shots.title: Circular packing · nested spheres (§9.9 ★)
shots.caption: d3-pack layout; volume encodes value, nesting encodes hierarchy

shots.title: Force-directed graph · 3D physics (§9.6)
shots.caption: d3-force-3d simulation settled for 200 ticks; nodes and links in full 3D

shots.title: Ridgeline · depth-offset (§9.9 ★)
shots.caption: 6 density rows offset in z instead of y — a mountain range in front of the reader

shots.title: Viz gallery · top-down
shots.caption: All six marks from above; treemap and packing read as city footprints

shots.title: Viz gallery · wide context
shots.caption: Reader at ~2m; full gallery fits in frame with surrounding grid

shots.title: Force graph · before interaction
shots.caption: Settled baseline before any node is touched

shots.title: Force graph · hover on node 3
shots.caption: Shared halo + billboarded label appear at hovered node; physics keeps running

shots.title: Force graph · hover on node 14
shots.caption: Same halo + label primitive re-parents to a different node

shots.title: Force graph · drag node up
shots.caption: Node pinned with fx/fy/fz; surrounding graph relaxes via physics

shots.title: Force graph · drag node toward reader
shots.caption: Pull a node out of the cluster; edges tension visibly

shots.title: Force graph · after release (physics relaxed)
shots.caption: Unpin; the graph settles into a new low-energy layout

shots.title: Tree · radial baseline
shots.caption: Per-node hover + pinch-select now wired, same pattern as the force graph

shots.title: Tree · hover on a leaf
shots.caption: Halo + billboarded label over the hovered node (leaf "gateway")

shots.title: Tree · hover on an internal node
shots.caption: Same infrastructure works for non-leaves ("compute")

shots.title: Tree · one node selected
shots.caption: Pinch latches a mint-green selection halo; persists when you look away

shots.title: Tree · multiple nodes selected
shots.caption: Multi-select — each pinch toggles independently

shots.title: Treemap · cell selected
shots.caption: Mint-green selection halo on treemap cell

shots.title: Treemap · multiple cells selected
shots.caption: Multi-select across treemap cells
